title: handoff.json (handoff_v1)
description: The structured record written by the handoff_write_v4 MCP tool at $WILLOW_HOME/dispatch/{dispatch_id}/handoff.json. closeout.md is RENDERED from this record (see handoff.py _render_closeout); this JSON is the source of truth. Grounded in src/willow_mcp/handoff.py.

narrative.description: Prose summary; rendered under '## What Was Done'.

findings.description: Rendered as the '## Findings' table (ID | Finding | Severity | Evidence).

severity.description: Free string; verify_handoff reads it. Common vocabularies: high/medium/low (findings) — distinct from the mai @constraint set critical/error/warning/info.

evidence.description: Joined with ', ' into the Evidence column.
